Welcome, scientists! This is where we find the question, test an idea and share what the evidence says.

Teacher
Your name
Subject
Science
Room
Lab 4
Lab day
Tuesday
THIS WEEK’S INVESTIGATION. How do light and water change the way a plant grows? Bring your observations—we will compare evidence, not guesses.

Investigation plan

01
Question
What happens when one plant receives less light?
Read
02
Method
Measure, photograph and record changes every day.
Guide
03
Share
Bring one claim and the evidence that supports it.
Notebook

Lab notebook checklist

ObserveWrite what you notice before you explain it.
MeasureUse units and label every result.
ReflectWhat changed your thinking today?

Safety checkpoint

Goggles firstWear eye protection before materials come out.
Hands cleanWash up after every investigation.
Ask before mixingNo material enters a container without permission.

Materials & family notes

BringOne clean glass jar with a lid.
ReturnField-study permission form by Friday.
Ask at homeWhat questions do you have about our local ecosystem?
